articles.author: Nate Ryan
articles.title: How to Watch UConn vs. Michigan Men’s National Championship Game 2026: TV, tipoff time, preview, odds - NBC Sports
articles.description: The Huskies and Wolverines will battle for the title as March Madness concludes in Indianapolis.
articles.content:
Michigan and UConn will meet for the 2026 NCAA Mens Basketball Championship on Monday night, April 6, as March Madness concludes at Lucas Oil Stadium in Indianapolis, Indiana.
